rulings.Case Title: LARRY GLADDEN VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Granting Leave To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 9, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiff¿s motion for order granting leave to file first amended complaint is granted. No opposition filed. The hearing will be at 10:30 a.m., not 9:30. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS HIXSON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (BP) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reconsider Defendant Collins Electrical Company, Inc.'S Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 9, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 9. Plaintiff¿s motion to reconsider defendant Collins Electrical Co., Inc.¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. Good cause for submission of late-filed opposition papers needs to be shown prior to or at the hearing for which the papers are submitted. It is not a proper use of either the 437c(h) or 1008 procedure to permit a party opposing a motion for summary judgment who filed opposition papers to make a showing of good cause after the hearing on the motion for summary judgment. The hearing will be at 10:30 a.m., not 9:30. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: CLARENCE DELOUIS VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P) AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 9, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 6. Defendant Scott Co. of California¿s motion for summary judgment is denied. The declaration of Andre Wright creates a triable issue whether defendant directed plaintiff to disturb asbestos-containing insulation. Defendant¿s objections to Mr. Wright¿s declaration are overruled. The hearing will be at 10:30 a.m., not 9:30. = (220/HEK)
